title: That creeper is a spy!
description: Creepers will now use foolproof disguise masks just like the tf2 spy
body:
# This resource pack requires either OptiFine or ETF
- [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads)
- [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
![Text in image: "That Creeper is a bloody spy!" - Steve, perhaps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84b8373dcde869e86ce5aa89a418405cd068e2b0_0.webp)
![A spinning creeper wearing a disguise mask](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c93b415497ef84fdb4fb66b7e2cd915b31388d80.gif)
- This resource pack makes creepers spawn using a random disguise mask of a vanilla Minecraft mob.
- Does this help the creepers sneak up on you more easily?, not really, I just think is kinda funny.
## List of all mask variants
1. Creeper (Happy)
2. Steve
3. Zombie
4. Husk
5. Drowned
6. Skeleton
7. Stray
8. Bogged
9. Wither Skeleton
10. Spider
11. Cave Spider
12. Enderman
13. Villager
14. Wandering Trader
15. Iron Golem
16. Snow Golem
17. Zombie Villager
18. Vindicator
19. Pillager
20. Witch
21. Silverfish
22. Endermite
23. Slime
24. Magma Cube
25. Breeze
26. Blaze
27. Ghast
28. Piglin
29. Piglin Brute
30. Zombified Piglin
31. Pig
32. Cow
33. Red Mooshroom
34. Brown Mooshroom
35. Sheep
36. Chicken
37. Rabbit
38. Wolf
39. Ocelot
40. Cat
41. Bee
42. Squid
43. Glow Squid
44. Turtle
45. Axolotl
46. Guardian
47. Elder Guardian
48. Allay
49. Vex
50. Shulker

_If you want to change a creeper's mask, you can use a name tag on it with the name of the mob you want!_
